_comment: M2 correctness-gate fixture. RWKV-7 1.5B (rwkv7-g1g-1.5b-20260526-ctx8192) greedy reference from bench/oracle_numpy.py (pure-numpy RWKV-7 fp32, BlinkDL .pth). sglang impl MUST reproduce greedy_tokens exactly at fp32. NB: prompt is a REAL newline (token 11); the 0.1B fixture instead used a literal backslash-n (tokens 93,111) -- a harmless quirk -- so prompt_tokens differ from the 0.1B fixture by the leading token(s) only.
prompt: The Eiffel Tower is located in the city of
greedy_text:
Paris, France.
The Eiffel Tower is a symbol of Paris and France.
The Eiffel Tower
